title: Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-14
content:
# Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-14

## Focus for Today (Saturday)
Weekend revenue + visibility stack:
1) warm lead pipeline movement
2) sphere referral nudges
3) one consumer-facing weekend post for Vancouver homeowners/buyers
4) COI intros with coffee conversion
5) recruiting maintenance only (strict cap)

## 1) Warm Lead Follow-up Block (10)

**Message A (weekend pulse):**
"Hey [Name] — quick Saturday check-in: are you still aiming to buy/sell this spring, or has your timing shifted? I can send a 60-second update for your target Vancouver area."

**Message B (booking CTA):**
"If helpful, we can do a quick 10-minute strategy call this weekend so you’re clear on next steps. I can do [Option 1] or [Option 2]."

## 2) Past-Client Sphere Check-in Block (5)

"Hey [Name] — hope your weekend’s going well. If anyone in your circle is thinking about buying or selling in Vancouver this year, I can help with a no-pressure plan. Want me to send a quick neighborhood value snapshot?"

## 3) Consumer-Facing Post (publish today)

**Hook:** "Vancouver homeowners: 3 things to do this weekend before listing this spring."

**Post draft:**
"If you’re planning to sell this spring, use this weekend to do these 3 things:\n\n1) Declutter your entry + living room (buyers decide fast)\n2) Pull a simple repairs list and handle the obvious fixes\n3) Get your pricing strategy ready before photos\n\nComment ‘CHECKLIST’ and I’ll send my Vancouver pre-listing prep sheet."

## 4) COI Outreach Block (3 intros, 1 coffee ask)

"Hey [Name] — I’m tightening my Vancouver referral network across mortgage, legal, and inspection partners so clients get better support. Open to a quick coffee next week to compare what buyers/sellers are struggling with right now?"

## 5) Recruiting Maintenance (15-minute cap)

Send 2 warm recruiting follow-ups max using existing scripts. No new recruiting campaign work.

## End-of-Day Scorecard Targets
- Warm follow-ups sent: 10
- Past-client check-ins sent: 5
- Consumer posts published: 1
- COI intros sent: 3
- Coffee chats booked: 1
- Recruiting follow-ups sent: 2 (cap)
- Replies received: target 5+
- Calls booked: target 2+
- Consults booked: target 1+
